title: I Remember Mama
writer: DeWitt Bodeen, John Van Druten, Kathryn Forbes
actors: Irene Dunne, Barbara Bel Geddes, Oscar Homolka
plot: A young writer recalls her ups and downs of growing up as one of four children to Norwegian immigrant parents in 1910s San Francisco.
awards: Nominated for 5 Oscars. 1 win & 8 nominations total
